SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Record Class Fields.Field<T>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.Fields.Field<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value held by this Field
Record Components:
id - the unique identifier for this Field
fields - a reference to the collection of Fields this Field belongs to
value - a reference to the current value of this Field
defaultValue - a supplier providing the default value for this Field
validateField - a function used to validate the value of this Field against the given Fields
dependencies - a list of Field identifiers on which this Field depends
dependents - a list of Field identifiers that depend on this Field
Enclosing class:
Fields
public static record Fields.Field<T>(String id, AtomicReference<@Nullable Fields> fields, AtomicReference<@Nullable T> value, Supplier<@Nullable T> defaultValue, BiFunction<@Nullable T,Fields,Optional<String>> validateField, List<String> dependencies, List<String> dependents) extends Record
A record representing a Field that holds a value of type T and supports validation and dependencies.

    Creates an instance of a Field record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Field

      public Field(String id, AtomicReference<@Nullable Fields> fields, AtomicReference<@Nullable T> value, Supplier<@Nullable T> defaultValue, BiFunction<@Nullable T,Fields,Optional<String>> validateField, List<String> dependencies, List<String> dependents)
      Creates an instance of a Field record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      fields - the value for the fields record component
      value - the value for the value record component
      defaultValue - the value for the defaultValue record component
      validateField - the value for the validateField record component
      dependencies - the value for the dependencies record component
      dependents - the value for the dependents record component

  • Method Details

    • validate

      public Function<T,Optional<String>> validate()
      Provides a validation function for the current field.

      The returned function takes a value of type T, validates it against associated fields, and updates the field if validation succeeds. It is intended to be used as the validation function for the InputControl associated with this Field.

      Returns:
      a function that accepts a value of type T and returns an Optional<String> containing an error message if validation fails, or Optional.empty() if it succeeds.

    • defaultValueAsBoolean

      public BooleanSupplier defaultValueAsBoolean()
      Converts the default value of the field to a boolean representation.

      The method returns a BooleanSupplier which determines whether the default value is explicitly set to Boolean.TRUE. It is intended to be used as the default value provider for InputControl instances that require a boolean default value.

      Returns:
      a BooleanSupplier that evaluates to true if the default value is Boolean.TRUE, otherwise false.

    • updateAndValidate

      public Optional<String> updateAndValidate(Fields fields, @Nullable T newValue)
      Updates the field's value and triggers validation of this field and all dependent fields.

      This method validates the provided new value against the current field's logic. If the validation is successful, the field's value is updated. Additionally, dependent fields are validated after the update. If any validation errors are encountered, an error message is returned.

      Parameters:
      fields - the collection of fields used for validation; ensures dependencies are considered during the validation process
      newValue - the new value of type T to be validated and potentially set as the field's value; can be null
      Returns:
      an Optional<String> containing a validation error message if the validation fails, or Optional.empty() if the operation succeeds

    • getValue

      public @Nullable T getValue()
      Retrieves the current value of the field. This value is stored in an AtomicReference and can be null.
      Returns:
      the current value of the field, or null if no value is set.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      public String id()
      Returns the value of the id record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the id record component

      Returns the value of the fields record component.
